summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Anka Healthcare CS Hub after bug fixes. Fixed datetime timezone handling bug in backend that was causing 500 errors on followups and renewal alerts endpoints. All 35 backend API tests now pass. Frontend UI testing confirms all pages and navigation working correctly with Recharts visualizations displaying properly.

fixed_issues.issue: 500 error due to datetime timezone handling - mixing naive and aware datetimes
fixed_issues.fix: Added proper date parsing in calculate_priority_score() to handle both ISO dates and simple date strings

fixed_issues.issue: 500 error due to datetime timezone handling in check_renewal_alerts()
fixed_issues.fix: Added proper date format detection and conversion to timezone-aware datetime

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span>, <span> cannot be child of <tbody> - not blocking but should be fixed for cleaner console

passed_tests: Backend: Login rejection with invalid credentials
Frontend: Login page loads with Anka branding
Frontend: Dashboard page with metrics and charts
Frontend: Clients page with health scores and status badges
Frontend: Client detail page with tabs
Frontend: Client performance charts (LineChart, BarChart, PieChart)
Frontend: Client org chart with contacts
Frontend: Alerts page with severity badges
Frontend: Follow-ups page with prioritized list
Frontend: Settings page with alert thresholds
action_items: Fix React hydration warning in ReportsPage - ensure proper table structure without wrapper spans in tbody
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds 12 sample clients, users, contacts, performance records, alerts, followups, and communications on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working. Backend datetime bug fixed. Recharts visualizations displaying correctly. Consider testing the AI scheduling and report generation features in more depth if time permits.

mocked_apis.note: .docx export partially stubbed, audit logging not fully integrated per main agent's note
